::: {.split-grid}
::: {.content-panel}
**Institutional address**

University of Bialystok  
Faculty of Computer Science  
ul. Konstantego Ciołkowskiego 1M  
15-245 Białystok  
room 2026
:::

::: {.content-panel}
**Direct contact**

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
Email: <span id="contact-email"></span>  
<script>
(() => {
  const target = document.getElementById("contact-email");
  if (!target) return;

  const user = String.fromCharCode(100, 46, 116, 111, 109, 97, 115, 122, 117, 107);
  const domain = String.fromCharCode(117, 119, 98, 46, 101, 100, 117, 46, 112, 108);
  const email = `${user}@${domain}`;
  const link = document.createElement("a");
  link.href = `mailto:${email}`;
  link.textContent = email;
  target.replaceChildren(link);
})();
</script>
<noscript>Email: d[dot]tomaszuk[at]uwb[dot]edu[dot]pl</noscript>  
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
Email: d[dot]tomaszuk[at]uwb[dot]edu[dot]pl  
:::

Phone: [+48 85 738 8330](tel:+48857388330)
:::
:::
